zh.Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊
zh.Stockton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯托克頓
zh.Polesworth, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Griffith II於1325年12月25日出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊時，他的父親Sir Rhys Griffith I37歲，母親Joan de Somerville20歲。他於1368年與Isabel de Stackpole在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年5月27日在英國瓦維其可爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

zh-hans.Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊
zh-hans.Stockton, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾斯托克頓
zh-hans.Polesworth, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys Griffith II于1325年12月25日出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安薩德萊时，他的父亲Sir Rhys Griffith I37岁，母亲Joan de Somerville20岁。他于1368年与Isabel de Stackpole在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1380年5月27日在英国瓦維其可爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Griffith II was born on 25 December 1325, in Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Sir Rhys Griffith I, was 37 and his mother, Joan de Somerville, was 20. He married Isabel de Stackpole in 1368, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 27 May 1380, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys Griffith II est né le 25 décembre 1325, à Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Sir Rhys Griffith I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Somerville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Stackpole en 1368, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1380, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Polesworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Griffith II am 25. Dezember 1325 in Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Rhys Griffith I 37 und seine Mutter Joan de Somerville 20. Er hat 1368 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Isabel de Stackpole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1380 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Warwickshire, England und wurde in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Griffith II è nato il il 25 dicembre 1325 nel Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Rhys Griffith I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Somerville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Stackpole nel 1368, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1380, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Griffith IIが1325年12月25日にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランサドウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Rhys Griffith Iは37歳，母Joan de Somervilleは20歳であった。1368年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでIsabel de Stackpoleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年5月27日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアポレスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Griffith II(이)가 1325년 12월 25일 웨일스 카마테실르 랜사드른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Rhys Griffith I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Somerville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1368년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Isabel de Stackpole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 5월 27일 영국 워윅실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 포레스워스에 묻혔다.

mn.25 December 1325–27 May 1380: 1325 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 25–1380 оны Тавдугаар сарын 27
mn.Polesworth, Warwickshire, England: Polesworth, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.25 December 1325–27 May 1380: 25 de dezembro de 1325–27 de maio de 1380
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Griffith II nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1325, em Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Rhys Griffith I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Somerville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Stackpole em 1368, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1380, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Griffith II родился 25 декабря 1325 г. в местности ллансадрн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Rhys Griffith I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Somerville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Stackpole в 1368 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 мая 1380 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности полесворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.25 December 1325–27 May 1380: 25 de diciembre de 1325–27 de mayo de 1380
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys Griffith II nació el 25 de diciembre de 1325, en Llansadwrn, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Rhys Griffith I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan de Somerville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabel de Stackpole en 1368, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1380, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
